data.title: RED: Tests for brainstorm gate allowlist bypass
data.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh contains allowlist bypass tests
  Verify: grep -q "allowlist\|bypass\|skill.*context" tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh
- [ ] Test asserts hook allows EnterPlanMode when an allowlisted skill context is active (e.g., fix-bug, sprint, debug-everything)
  Verify: grep -q "allowlist.*allow\|bypass.*allow\|skill.*allow" tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh
- [ ] Test asserts hook blocks EnterPlanMode when a non-allowlisted skill context is active
  Verify: grep -q "non.*allowlist\|unknown.*skill\|block" tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh
- [ ] All new allowlist tests FAIL (RED) against current hook (no allowlist exists)
  Verify: env -u CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT bash tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"

## TDD Requirement
Add new test cases to the EXISTING tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh file. Tests should create a skill-context signal file (e.g., a file in ARTIFACTS_DIR indicating the active skill) and invoke hook_brainstorm_gate without a sentinel, asserting exit 0 (allowed via bypass). The detection strategy for active skill context should be: check for a skill-context file at $ARTIFACTS_DIR/active-skill-context containing the skill name. Tests must FAIL because hook_brainstorm_gate currently has no allowlist check.

## File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh (modify)
